name: vibe-code-1000-websites
description: Site generation engine + gallery for the 1000 Websites Challenge

scripts.engine:games:all: node scripts/expand-games-catalog.mjs --from=101 --to=200 && node scripts/generate-games.mjs --force && node scripts/sync-hub.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.engine:launch: npm run engine:games:all && npm run validate && npm run verify:routes
scripts.engine:apps:all: node scripts/expand-apps-catalog.mjs --from=201 --to=300 && node scripts/generate-apps.mjs --force && node scripts/sync-hub.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.engine:scale:300: npm run engine:games:all && npm run engine:apps:all && npm run validate && npm run verify:routes
scripts.engine:batch2:all: node scripts/expand-batch2-catalog.mjs --from=301 --to=500 && node scripts/generate-batch2.mjs --force && node scripts/sync-hub.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.engine:scale:500: npm run engine:batch2:all && npm run validate && npm run verify:routes
scripts.engine:batch3:all: node scripts/expand-batch3-catalog.mjs --from=501 --to=1000 && node scripts/generate-batch3.mjs --force && node scripts/sync-hub.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.engine:scale:1000: npm run engine:batch3:all && npm run validate && npm run verify:routes
scripts.engine:seo: node scripts/generate-sites.mjs --force && node scripts/sync-hub.mjs && node scripts/generate-sitemap.mjs
scripts.verify:all: node scripts/validate.mjs && node scripts/verify-routes.mjs && node scripts/verify-live.mjs
